ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: OR( AND( ISCHANGED(Stage__c), ISPICKVAL(Stage__c, 'Possession / Handover'), OR( ISBLANK(Sale_Deed_Date__c), NOT(Signed_Sales_Deed_Uploaded__c), ISBLANK(Registration_Number__c), AND( ISPICKVAL(Funding_Type__c, 'Loan'), NOT(DD_Uploaded__c) ) ) ), AND( ISCHANGED(Stage_Status__c), ISPICKVAL(Stage_Status__c, 'Completed'), ISPICKVAL(Stage__c, 'Registration'), OR( ISBLANK(Sale_Deed_Date__c), NOT(Signed_Sales_Deed_Uploaded__c), ISBLANK(Registration_Number__c), AND( ISPICKVAL(Funding_Type__c, 'Loan'), NOT(DD_Uploaded__c) ) ) ) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Please fill all the mandatory fields in Registration Section
